verses.1: “At that time,” declares the LORD, “the bones of the kings of Judah, the bones of the officials, the bones of the priests, the bones of the prophets, and the bones of the people of Jerusalem will be removed from their graves.
verses.2: They will be exposed to the sun and moon, and to all the host of heaven which they have loved, served, followed, consulted, and worshiped. Their bones will not be gathered up or buried, but will become like dung lying on the ground.
verses.3: And wherever I have banished them, the remnant of this evil family will choose death over life,” declares the LORD of Hosts.
verses.4: So you are to tell them this is what the LORD says:
